B.Tech CS (AI & ML)

Shashank Pentala

I engineer at the intersection of large language models, autonomous agents, and enterprise infrastructure. My work focuses on designing AI systems that don't just respond — they reason, plan, and act across complex multi-step workflows.

At LTTS's CTO Department, I build production-grade agentic platforms — from intelligent MCP routing servers and enterprise RAG pipelines to multimodal CAD inspection agents and AI-powered healthcare assistants. Every system I build is designed to solve a real business bottleneck, with cost models and architecture decisions documented for enterprise-scale deployment.

My foundation is a B.Tech in Computer Science (AI & ML) with a 9.33 CGPA, combined with a published IEEE paper on fraud detection using genetic algorithms. I care deeply about making AI systems that are technically rigorous, practically useful, and deployable at scale.

Work History

Professional Experience

Building real-world AI systems that operate at enterprise scale.

Engineer
L&T Technology Services (LTTS) — CTO Department · Bengaluru
Jul 2024 – Present
Agentic AI Suitability & Cost Estimation Platform — "Agentic Synapse"
AI Platform
End-to-end platform enabling any business team to evaluate whether their use case is suitable for autonomous AI agents — without needing deep ML expertise.
  • Conversational Q&A scoping engine that interviews stakeholders and maps use cases to weighted agent suitability scores across dimensions like task complexity, latency requirements, and data availability
  • Automated multi-agent architecture generator that decomposes a business use case into specialized agent roles, each with independent LLM recommendations based on task type
  • Dynamic AI Cost Estimation Engine producing full breakdowns: LLM token costs, infrastructure, development amortization, human oversight, and external API costs — benchmarked against traditional non-agent approaches with volume-tier savings analysis
  • One-click PDF and Excel report generation pipelines producing stakeholder-ready output with cost comparison charts, methodology documentation, and ROI projections
MCP Intelligent Routing & Persistent Memory Server
MCP
Custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) server addressing two fundamental limitations in production LLM deployments: routing intelligence and statelessness.
  • LLM-backed intelligent tool routing layer that autonomously selects the right agent pipeline based on real-time user intent — eliminating hardcoded routing logic
  • MCP Sampling implementation orchestrating parallel specialist sub-agents (security, performance, code style, bug detection) with a synthesizer agent producing multi-perspective analysis in a single call
  • Persistent memory solution enabling LLM agents to retain context across multi-session workflows — directly addressing the stateless architecture bottleneck in enterprise deployments
  • Real-time visual flow UI using SSE (Server-Sent Events) showing live routing decisions, tool discovery steps, and agent sampling execution — used for internal demos and leadership presentations
RAG Pipelines & Haystack Framework
RAG
Enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation system grounding LLM responses in verified domain knowledge — significantly reducing hallucinations in high-stakes enterprise queries.
  • End-to-end document ingestion pipeline with configurable chunking strategies (fixed-size, semantic, sentence-window) and embedding model selection for different document types
  • Haystack-based retrieval and QA pipeline combining dense vector search with LLM generation stages, tuned for domain-specific accuracy on enterprise knowledge bases
  • Retrieval ranking optimization experiments comparing BM25, dense retrieval, and hybrid approaches to maximize precision for technical documentation queries
AI-Powered Healthcare Assistant & Clinical Intelligence System
Healthcare AI
End-to-end clinical documentation automation platform built on n8n workflow automation and LLM orchestration — turning patient conversations into structured, doctor-ready clinical notes.
  • Speech-to-text transcription pipeline feeding into LLM-based symptom extraction and medical entity structuring with clinical terminology normalization
  • Patient record comparison engine that ingests both historical and current visit data, identifies changes in symptoms and conditions, and surfaces delta insights for clinicians
  • Longitudinal analysis module generating doctor-ready summaries with progression indicators, flag conditions, and treatment response tracking across visits
  • Automated clinical report generation with configurable templates — reduced manual documentation effort and enabled faster consultations across the workflow
CAD Drawing Inspector Agent — Google Cloud Vertex AI & Agent Builder
Vertex AI
Automated multimodal compliance inspection agent on Google Cloud — replacing manual engineering drawing review with an AI-driven audit pipeline.
  • Multimodal ingestion workflow enabling the agent to parse engineering blueprints, extract geometric annotations, verify dimensions, and validate structural clearances against design checklists
  • Structured audit report generation with pass/warning/failure verdicts per checklist item — providing traceability for every inspection decision
  • System-level guardrails and targeted prompt engineering strategies to prevent hallucinations on critical geometric measurements — maintaining deterministic verification accuracy on safety-relevant parameters
  • Deployed on Vertex AI Agent Builder, enabling scalable invocation across multiple concurrent drawing review workflows without manual queuing
AILab — Proxmox Virtualization Management Platform
Infrastructure
Custom infrastructure management layer over Proxmox VE, enabling full virtual machine and container lifecycle control through a purpose-built management platform.
  • Direct Proxmox VE REST API integrations with secure token-based authentication (PVEAuthCookie + CSRF protection) ensuring robust and safe backend communication
  • Complex JSON payload mapping for cluster nodes, storage pools, and network bridges into clean structured data layers enabling real-time infrastructure state monitoring
  • Full VM and LXC container lifecycle modules (start, stop, reboot, configure, snapshot) exposed through a unified management interface
Agentic Frameworks — LangChain, Lyzr & Industrial AI
Multi-Agent
Research, evaluation, and implementation of production agentic patterns across LangChain, Lyzr, LangGraph, and n8n — spanning industrial ML and NLP applications.
  • Autonomous AI agents with tool use, persistent memory, and goal-directed task execution across multiple enterprise use cases using LangChain and Lyzr
  • LangGraph stateful multi-agent orchestration using cyclic decision graphs — enabling complex branching workflows with conditional agent re-entry and state persistence
  • n8n-based autonomous workflow pipelines connecting webhooks, external APIs, LLM processing nodes, and internal databases with conditional routing and graceful error-handling
  • Energy Yield Prediction ML model for industrial utility tracking and a Resume Parsing Agent using NLP for intelligent entity extraction and candidate profiling
Academic Work

Academic Projects

Research-driven projects spanning fraud detection, computer vision, and NLP.

🔬

Visa Fraud Detection via Genetic Algorithm

Reduced false transactions and fraud-prone card limits using evolutionary optimization for anomaly detection in financial datasets. Published in IEEE.

IEEE Published
👁️

Face Mask Recognition using CNN (MobileNet)

MobileNet-based CNN achieving >96% detection accuracy using TensorFlow, Keras, and OpenCV — optimized for real-time inference on edge devices.

Movie Recommendation System

Hybrid recommendation engine combining collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, and hybrid approaches using R and the Recommenderlab framework.
